labels.analysis: The MCP Server "io.github.Whitemarmot/copyright01" provides 6 tools focused on security & authentication tasks. Core capabilities include creation and generation, data access and reading, modification and updates. Key tools: create-deposit-tool, list-deposits-tool, get-deposit-tool, verify-hash-tool, verify-certificate-tool.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Security & Authentication" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: certificate.
labels.tool_verified_reason: gateway timeout: Target server timed out

tools.name: create-deposit-tool
tools.title: Create Deposit Tool
tools.description:
Create a new copyright deposit. Supported types: text, website, youtube, social, github.
    For text deposits, provide content_text. For other types, provide website_url.
    Returns the deposit details with certificate verification code.

type.description: Deposit type: text, website, youtube, social, or github

content_text.description: Text content to protect (required for type=text, min 10 characters)

website_url.description: URL to protect (required for website/youtube/social/github types)

is_public.description: Whether the deposit is publicly visible (default: true)

tools.name: list-deposits-tool
tools.title: List Deposits Tool
tools.description:
List your copyright deposits with optional filtering and pagination.
    Returns up to 20 deposits per page.

type.description: Filter by deposit type: text, website, youtube, social, github

status.description: Filter by status: pending, certified, failed

tools.name: get-deposit-tool
tools.title: Get Deposit Tool
tools.description:
Get details of a specific deposit by its ID.
    Only returns deposits owned by the authenticated user (IDOR-protected).

tools.name: verify-hash-tool
tools.title: Verify Hash Tool
tools.description:
Verify a SHA-256 hash against all deposits.
    Checks your own deposits and public deposits.
    Returns the matching deposit if found.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash to verify (64 hex characters)

tools.name: verify-certificate-tool
tools.title: Verify Certificate Tool
tools.description:
Verify a certificate by its verification code.
    Returns the associated deposit details if found.
    Works for public deposits and your own private deposits.

tools.name: get-profile-tool
tools.title: Get Profile Tool
tools.description:
Get your profile information including plan, credits remaining,
    storage usage, and deposit count.
